Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2026

Who We Are

InfinityScape is an independent online store. Contact us at infinityscape@outlook.com.

What Information We Collect

Payment details are handled entirely by Stripe. We may collect your name, email and shipping address solely to fulfil your order.

How We Use Your Information

Your information is used only to process and deliver your order. We do not sell or share your data for marketing purposes.

Contact

Reach us at infinityscape@outlook.com

Terms & Conditions

Last updated: June 2026

Product Appearance

Products may vary slightly in appearance from images shown. We are confident you will be delighted with what arrives.

Packaging

Orders may arrive in third-party packaging including from retailers such as Amazon. This is completely normal and has no bearing on quality or authenticity.

Pricing

All prices are in Euros (€). The price at checkout is the price that applies to your order.

Contact

Reach us at infinityscape@outlook.com

Shipping Information

Processing Time

All orders are processed within 1–2 business days.

Delivery Times

Standard worldwide shipping typically takes 7–14 business days.

Free Shipping

Free standard shipping on all orders, worldwide. No minimum spend required.

Questions?

Reach us at infinityscape@outlook.com

Our Returns Policy

We truly appreciate every order and want you to love your purchase.

Why We Don't Accept Returns

As a small independent store, each order is fulfilled and shipped directly to you. This allows us to keep prices low and offer free worldwide shipping.

Something Wrong?

If your item arrives damaged or faulty, reach out within 7 days and we'll make it right.

Contact

Reach us at infinityscape@outlook.com

Get in Touch

We'd love to hear from you — we're here and happy to help.

Email Us

Reach us at infinityscape@outlook.com

Response Time

We aim to respond within 24 hours, 7 days a week.
